name: Chicken Alfredo
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large nonstick skillet until hot. Stir-fry chicken until browned.
2. Stir in 2/3 cup French's® French-Fried Onions and the remaining ingredients. Bring to boiling; reduce heat. Simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Serve over pasta. Top with remaining onions.
